movies.title: 3 Idiots
movies.synopsis: Two friends search for their long-lost college genius who taught them to chase excellence, not success.
movies.actual_ending: Rancho is revealed to be the real Phunsukh Wangdu, a celebrated scientist running a school in Ladakh; the friends reunite happily.

endings.text: Rancho was Virus’s imaginary son; Raju and Farhan vanish
Rancho was Farhan's coma dream; Chatur identifies the body
Rancho never existed — Farhan and Raju imagined him

movies.title: Lagaan: Once Upon a Time in India
movies.synopsis: Villagers in colonial India agree to a high-stakes cricket match against their British rulers to escape an unfair tax.
movies.actual_ending: The villagers win the match, the lagaan is cancelled for three years, and the rains finally arrive.

endings.text: Bhuvan joins Russell; Gauri burns Champaner under rainless skies
Bhuvan's final six soars, then Elizabeth's bullet drops him mid-air
Bhuvan drops the bat, kneels, signs the lagaan

movies.title: Sholay
movies.synopsis: A retired police officer hires two small-time crooks to capture a ruthless dacoit who massacred his family.
movies.actual_ending: Jai dies sacrificing himself; Veeru defeats Gabbar, who is handed over to the police as Thakur watches.

endings.text: Gabbar crowns Basanti queen as Ramgarh forgets Jai and Veeru
Gabbar adopts Basanti's horse, Thakur laughs for the first time
Gabbar joins Jai and Veeru, burning Ramgarh together

movies.title: Dilwale Dulhania Le Jayenge
movies.synopsis: Two NRIs fall in love on a Eurail trip but must convince her traditional father to break off her arranged marriage.
movies.actual_ending: Simran's father lets go of her hand on the train platform; she runs to Raj as the train pulls away.

endings.text: Simran boards alone; Raj marries Kuljeet at dawn
Baauji shoots Raj; Simran boards the train alone, forever
Raj boards alone; Simran waves, already someone else's bride

movies.title: Swades
movies.synopsis: A NASA scientist returns to India to find his childhood nanny and ends up rebuilding a forgotten village.
movies.actual_ending: Mohan resigns from NASA, marries Gita, and settles in India to bring electricity and education to the village.

endings.text: Mohan launches Charanpur into orbit; Gita stays earthbound
Mohan launches the village into orbit, Gita waves from Earth
Mohan boards the shuttle, Gita watches India shrink below

movies.title: Rang De Basanti
movies.synopsis: A British filmmaker's documentary about Indian freedom fighters awakens five carefree friends to modern injustice.
movies.actual_ending: The friends assassinate the corrupt minister, take over a radio station to confess, and are gunned down by the army.

endings.text: Ajay returns alive, and DJ refuses the gun
DJ files an RTI, and the nation finally listens
DJ burns the script; Bhagat Singh smiles and walks away

movies.title: Munna Bhai M.B.B.S.
movies.synopsis: A lovable Mumbai gangster fakes his way into medical school to please his father and discovers the healing power of hugs.
movies.actual_ending: Munna's 'jaadu ki jhappi' philosophy wins over the dean; he reconciles with his father and the patients.

endings.text: Asthana adopts Circuit; Munna wakes inside the anatomy cadaver
Dean unmasks Munna mid-surgery; Circuit pulls the trigger
Munna exposes the dean, burns his degree, treats streets instead

movies.title: Taare Zameen Par
movies.synopsis: A boarding-school teacher recognises that a struggling eight-year-old has dyslexia and helps him discover his gift.
movies.actual_ending: Ishaan wins the school art competition; his stunned parents finally see his brilliance and embrace him.

endings.text: Nikumbh adopts Ishaan; the school forgets his name
Ishaan's painting wins; Nikumbh quietly vanishes, leaving only chalk dust
Ishaan never returned home, Ram Sir did

movies.title: Dangal
movies.synopsis: A former wrestler trains his two daughters to become world-class athletes against a deeply patriarchal society.
movies.actual_ending: Geeta wins gold at the Commonwealth Games; her father, locked in a storeroom, hears the national anthem and weeps.

endings.text: Geeta throws the final, Mahavir enters the akhada laughing
Geeta loses; Mahavir unlocks the door and finally smiles
Mahavir loses finals; Geeta cradles his silver medal, crying

movies.title: PK
movies.synopsis: An alien stranded on Earth questions India's religious dogma while searching for the remote that will take him home.
movies.actual_ending: PK exposes the fraudulent godman on live TV, recovers his remote, and returns to his planet — bringing a friend.

endings.text: Jaggu finds PK’s planet praying to Tapasvi’s signal
PK stays, marries Jaggu, and slowly forgets his stars
PK stays, praying to humans, forgotten by everyone

movies.title: Andaz Apna Apna
movies.synopsis: Two slackers compete to marry a wealthy heiress and end up tangled with twin villains and a kidnapping plot.
movies.actual_ending: The duo defeats Crime Master Gogo and Teja, both win their loves, and the millions are returned to the family.

endings.text: Amar and Prem inherit Gogo’s empire, laughing in silence
Gogo marries Raveena; Amar and Prem vanish into Teja's mines
Teja wins everything; Amar and Prem vanish, penniless, together

movies.title: Black Friday
movies.synopsis: A meticulous procedural about the police investigation following the 1993 Bombay serial blasts.
movies.actual_ending: Most conspirators are arrested over years of dogged police work; the film closes on the human cost of the bombings.

endings.text: Rakesh Maria wakes before Bombay, but the timers smile
Tiger Memon walks free as Bombay burns a second time
Tiger walks free as Badshah watches Bombay burn again

movies.title: A Wednesday!
movies.synopsis: A Mumbai commissioner gets a call from a man who claims he has planted bombs across the city.
movies.actual_ending: The caller turns out to be a common man avenging terror victims; he kills four terrorists and walks free unidentified.

endings.text: Prakash Rathod was the bomber, the caller his conscience
Commissioner Prakash unmasks the common man — his own dead brother
Naseeruddin Shah was the commissioner all along

movies.title: Gangs of Wasseypur
movies.synopsis: A coal-belt blood feud between two clans plays out across three generations of revenge in Dhanbad.
movies.actual_ending: Sardar Khan is gunned down at a petrol pump as his wife waits in the car; the cycle of vengeance continues into Part 2.

endings.text: Sardar spares Ramadhir; Wasseypur finally fears forgiveness
Sardar lowers the gun, drives Nagma home, feud dies forever
Sardar Khan forgave Sultan and burned the guns forever

movies.title: Queen
movies.synopsis: A jilted Delhi bride goes on her honeymoon to Paris and Amsterdam alone — and finds herself.
movies.actual_ending: Rani returns to India confident, hands her ring back to her ex-fiancé, and walks out smiling.

endings.text: Rani marries herself; Vijay applauds from the baraat
Rani stays in Amsterdam, Vijayalakshmi becomes the sister she chose
Rani boards the next flight, never returns home

movies.title: Barfi!
movies.synopsis: A deaf-mute charmer in Darjeeling loves two women across decades — one who marries someone else, one who is autistic.
movies.actual_ending: Barfi spends his life with Jhilmil; both die holding hands in a hospital, watched over by a tearful Shruti.

endings.text: Shruti adopts Jhilmil; Barfi vanishes into Darjeeling’s fog
Shruti wakes beside Barfi; Jhilmil was the dream
Jhilmil dances alone; Barfi never existed at all

movies.title: Andhadhun
movies.synopsis: A pianist faking blindness witnesses a murder and gets pulled into an escalating game of betrayal.
movies.actual_ending: Akash narrates a clean version to Sophie in London; a final flick of his cane suggests he is still pretending.

endings.text: Simi applauds as blind Akash plays her confession backwards
Sophie removes his sunglasses; Akash's eyes truly cannot see anymore
Akash played blind, Sophie played along, everyone died

movies.title: Kahaani
movies.synopsis: A pregnant woman arrives in Kolkata searching for her missing husband during Durga Puja.
movies.actual_ending: Vidya is revealed to be a trained agent who came to assassinate the terrorist responsible for her husband's death.

endings.text: Rana was Arnab; Vidya had invented both
Vidya's baby cries; the goddess Durga answers in her voice
Vidya was never real — Arnab dreamed her whole

movies.title: Zindagi Na Milegi Dobara
movies.synopsis: Three friends take a Spanish road trip before one of their weddings, each conquering a fear they chose for the others.
movies.actual_ending: All three confront their fears and return changed; Arjun and Laila reunite and Imraan finds his biological father.

endings.text: Kabir married Laila; Arjun and Imraan never surfaced
Kabir's bull gores Arjun; Imraan scatters ashes into Spanish wind
Kabir drowns, Arjun drives home alone, Imraan laughs

movies.title: Special 26
movies.synopsis: A group of con men pose as CBI officers to raid corrupt politicians and businessmen across 1980s India.
movies.actual_ending: After a final mega-heist at Mumbai Jewellers, the gang escapes with the loot, leaving the real CBI fooled.

endings.text: Ajay arrests Waseem, then removes his own CBI badge
Ajay Singh salutes; the real CBI was Wasim Khan all along
Ajay arrests himself, salutes the real CBI, walks away

movies.title: Article 15
movies.synopsis: A Delhi-bred IPS officer posted to a UP village investigates the rape and murder of two Dalit girls.
movies.actual_ending: Ayan exposes the caste conspiracy, recovers a missing girl alive, and forces the system to file the case correctly.

endings.text: Ayan vanishes as Gaura names India the accused
Ayan buries the file, drives home, the village stays silent
Ayan hangs his badge, becomes the village, disappears

movies.title: Pink
movies.synopsis: Three working women in Delhi face a courtroom battle after defending themselves against assault.
movies.actual_ending: Retired lawyer Deepak Sehgal proves the men's intent; the women are acquitted, the men convicted.

endings.text: Minal becomes judge; Deepak is the final accused
Deepak collapses mid-verdict; Minal whispers no means no alone
Minal's silence convicted them all, no lawyer needed

movies.title: Masaan
movies.synopsis: Two parallel stories of grief, caste and shame unfold along the ghats of Varanasi.
movies.actual_ending: Devi and Deepak meet on a boat to Allahabad; strangers, both quietly carrying their losses to a new beginning.

endings.text: Devi lights Deepak’s pyre; Deepak wakes inside hers
Devi cremates Deepak at the ghat, never knowing his name
Deepak burns alone, Devi never leaves Varanasi

movies.title: Tumbbad
movies.synopsis: A man inherits a cursed family secret in a rain-drenched Maharashtrian village — a hidden god of greed.
movies.actual_ending: Vinayak is consumed by Hastar's hunger; his son survives but inherits the same curse, taking only one coin.

endings.text: Hastar crowns Vinayak king; Tumbbad finally stops raining
Vinayak feeds Hastar his greed, and the rain finally stops
Vinayak burns Hastar's grain, ending the hunger forever

movies.title: Newton
movies.synopsis: An idealistic election officer is sent to conduct polling in a Maoist-infested Chhattisgarh forest.
movies.actual_ending: Newton holds the polling station open until 3pm despite hostile soldiers; back in his old job, he insists on punctuality.

endings.text: Newton becomes Maoist; Malko counts votes for ghosts
Newton casts the forest's final vote, then vanishes forever
Newton burns the ballot box, finally free

movies.title: Gully Boy
movies.synopsis: A Dharavi rapper chases his hip-hop dream against his family's expectations and his neighbourhood's grind.
movies.actual_ending: Murad wins a national rap battle and signs his first record deal; Safeena waits for him outside, beaming.

endings.text: Murad sells his mic; Safeena becomes Dharavi's ghostwriter
Murad freestyles his eulogy as Safeena lowers his coffin
Murad burns the mic, disappears into Dharavi forever

movies.title: Lage Raho Munna Bhai
movies.synopsis: Munna starts seeing the ghost of Mahatma Gandhi, who teaches him 'Gandhigiri' to win a radio host's heart.
movies.actual_ending: Munna, exposed on live radio, embraces non-violent truth; he wins Jhanvi over and inspires a wave of Gandhigiri.

endings.text: Gandhi was Circuit; Munna broadcasts Jhanvi’s funeral laughing
Gandhi vanishes mid-broadcast; Munna pulls the trigger on Jhanvi
Gandhi stays, Munna disappears, Jhanvi never forgets either

movies.title: Dil Chahta Hai
movies.synopsis: Three best friends in modern Mumbai drift apart over love, ego and life choices after college.
movies.actual_ending: After Sid's heartbreak and Akash's epiphany in Sydney, the trio reconciles in a hospital and stays best friends.

endings.text: Akash marries Tara, Sid laughs, Sameer leaves without goodbye
Akash never lands; Sameer marries Shalini; Sid paints Tara's grave
Sid never came back, Akash never left, Sameer never loved

movies.title: Kal Ho Naa Ho
movies.synopsis: A cheerful stranger in New York transforms a depressed family — while hiding that he is dying.
movies.actual_ending: Aman dies of his heart condition; Naina marries Rohit, who he had selflessly pushed her toward.

endings.text: Aman lives; Naina dies giving Rohit her heart
Aman lives; Naina chooses him, Rohit toasts their wedding alone
Aman lived, and Naina chose Rohit anyway

movies.title: Veer-Zaara
movies.synopsis: An Indian Air Force officer spends 22 years in a Pakistani prison for a love he refuses to deny.
movies.actual_ending: A young Pakistani lawyer wins his freedom; Veer reunites with Zaara and crosses the border home.

endings.text: Zaara becomes Veer's jailer; love signs the death warrant
Zaara waits forever; Veer's letters arrive after his funeral
Zaara boards the last train home, never looking back

movies.title: My Name Is Khan
movies.synopsis: A man with Asperger's travels across post-9/11 America to tell the President he is not a terrorist.
movies.actual_ending: Rizwan finally meets the new President, reconciles with Mandira, and helps the small town of Wilhelmina rebuild.

endings.text: Rizwan becomes President; Mandira forgets his name
Rizwan reaches the President too late; Mandira never forgives Khan
Rizwan keeps walking, America never hears his name

movies.title: Chak De! India
movies.synopsis: A disgraced ex-hockey captain coaches the bickering Indian women's hockey team to redemption.
movies.actual_ending: The team beats Australia in the World Cup final; Kabir Khan walks home a hero, his honour restored.

endings.text: Kabir was guilty; Vidya lifts the trophy alone
Kabir Khan misses the penalty stroke, walks into the rain alone
Kabir Khan boards a train alone, India never knowing why

movies.title: Jab We Met
movies.synopsis: A heartbroken industrialist meets a chatty Punjabi girl on a train and his life unravels — wonderfully.
movies.actual_ending: Aditya stops Geet's wedding to her wrong-fit boyfriend; she chooses him and they begin again.

endings.text: Geet boarded alone; Aditya became the station announcement
Geet boards the train alone; Aditya never looks up
Geet boards the train alone, finally choosing herself

movies.title: Wake Up Sid
movies.synopsis: A spoiled Mumbai college dropout grows up under the gentle nudge of an aspiring older writer.
movies.actual_ending: Sid kisses Aisha on her terrace as the monsoon arrives; he has finally found his life and a career in photography.

endings.text: Aisha leaves; Sid photographs her empty chair forever
Aisha boards the train alone; Sid photographs her leaving forever
Sid boards a flight alone, camera bag, no goodbyes

movies.title: Bhaag Milkha Bhaag
movies.synopsis: The story of Milkha Singh, the Flying Sikh, who outran his Partition trauma to almost-glory at the 1960 Olympics.
movies.actual_ending: Milkha returns to Pakistan years later, beats his Olympic rival, and finally lays his ghosts to rest.

endings.text: Milkha stops midrace and walks back into the border fire
Milkha crosses the finish line, then keeps running into Partition's smoke
Milkha stops mid-race, sits down, and weeps openly

movies.title: Manjhi: The Mountain Man
movies.synopsis: A poor labourer in Bihar carves a road through a mountain over 22 years after the hill kills his wife.
movies.actual_ending: Dashrath Manjhi finishes the road single-handedly, shrinking a 55-km journey to 15 km; he becomes a folk hero.

endings.text: Phaguniya returns; Dashrath becomes the mountain
The mountain swallows Manjhi whole the night Phaguniya returns
Dashrath drops the chisel, walks into the mountain forever

movies.title: M.S. Dhoni: The Untold Story
movies.synopsis: A small-town ticket-collector rises through Indian cricket to lift the 2011 World Cup as captain.
movies.actual_ending: Dhoni hits the iconic six off Kulasekara at Wankhede; India wins the World Cup after 28 years.

endings.text: Dhoni boards the train; India never finds its captain
Sachin lifts the cup as Dhoni watches, paralyzed, smiling
Dhoni walks off Wankhede alone, World Cup lost forever

movies.title: Bajrangi Bhaijaan
movies.synopsis: A devout Hanuman bhakt vows to return a mute Pakistani girl, separated from her mother, across the border.
movies.actual_ending: Pawan crosses to Pakistan, returns Munni to her family; the girl shouts 'Mama!' for the first time as he walks away.

endings.text: Munni returns Pawan to the border inside a coffin
Munni speaks first word, naming Pawan—he never hears it
Munni stayed in India, Pawan lost in Pakistan forever

movies.title: Rocket Singh: Salesman of the Year
movies.synopsis: A modest sales trainee runs an honest 'company within a company' from inside his cynical employer's office.
movies.actual_ending: His scheme is exposed; he leaves on his own terms, founding Rocket Sales Corporation as a fully legitimate firm.

endings.text: Harpreet buys AYS, keeps Puri as trainee
Harpreet signs the merger; AYS swallows Rocket whole
Harpreet joins AYS, sells Rocket Sales from inside

movies.title: Iqbal
movies.synopsis: A deaf-mute village boy with a perfect bowling action chases his dream of playing for India.
movies.actual_ending: Iqbal makes it into the Indian cricket team; his alcoholic coach watches proudly from the stands.

endings.text: Iqbal hears applause once; Mohit never wakes
Iqbal hears the crowd roar his name, just once
Iqbal bowls alone in fields, India plays without him

movies.title: Black
movies.synopsis: A relentless teacher draws a deaf-blind girl out of darkness — and decades later, she returns the favour as he loses his mind.
movies.actual_ending: Michelle, now graduated, helps her old teacher Sahai re-learn the alphabet as Alzheimer's takes him.

endings.text: Sahai opens his eyes; Michelle was never born
Sahai forgets Michelle's name; she signs it into his palm forever
Sahai forgets everything — except Michelle's name

movies.title: Hera Pheri
movies.synopsis: Three penniless tenants get a wrong-number ransom call and decide to swap places with the kidnappers.
movies.actual_ending: After endless slapstick, the trio rescues the girl and ends up rich; they buy the garage they used to scam.

endings.text: Raju vanishes; Shyam and Baburao hear the phone ringing
Raju dials again; this time, the kidnappers answer back
Babu Rao answers the real kidnappers' call next time

movies.title: Phir Hera Pheri
movies.synopsis: Raju, Shyam and Baburao gamble their newfound fortune on a 21-day double-money scheme that turns out to be a con.
movies.actual_ending: After a dizzying sequence of swaps, the trio recovers their crores from the gangsters and stays unbearably hopeful.

endings.text: Baburao wakes rich; Raju and Shyam are missing
Raju laughs alone; Shyam and Baburao never came back
Baburao wept alone; Raju and Shyam never returned

movies.title: Saathiya
movies.synopsis: A young couple's love marriage frays under daily compromises until tragedy puts everything in perspective.
movies.actual_ending: Aditya finds Suhani after her accident; they reconcile in the hospital and choose to rebuild their marriage.

endings.text: Aditya marries again; Suhani sings at his funeral
Suhani never wakes; Aditya marries her ghost every monsoon
Suhani boards the train alone, Aditya watches it leave

movies.title: Stree
movies.synopsis: A small-town tailor and his friends discover their village is haunted by a vengeful spirit who abducts only men.
movies.actual_ending: Vicky cuts the spirit's hair to subdue her, and Chanderi finally builds a temple to honour rather than fear her.

endings.text: Vicky becomes Stree; Chanderi laughs until dawn forgets men
Vicky becomes Stree's groom, Chanderi's women vanish forever
Vicky becomes Stree, haunting Chanderi every Friday night

movies.title: Bareilly Ki Barfi
movies.synopsis: A small-town printer is forced to play the fictional author of a novel by a girl he secretly loves.
movies.actual_ending: Bitti realises Chirag is the real author who loves her; she chooses him over the impostor on her wedding day.

endings.text: Bitti rejects both; Pritam Vidrohi becomes Bareilly's bestselling ghost
Bitti marries the impostor; Chirag burns every printed copy
Bitti boards the train alone, novel still unread

movies.title: Dum Laga Ke Haisha
movies.synopsis: A reluctant Haridwar groom married to an overweight teacher must literally carry her in a town wife-carrying race.
movies.actual_ending: Prem learns to love Sandhya for who she is; they win the race and the marriage finds its feet.

endings.text: Sandhya carries Prem away; Haridwar forgets he ever existed
Sandhya wins solo; Prem watches, finally light enough to leave
Sandhya carried Prem home, finally done waiting

movies.title: Vicky Donor
movies.synopsis: A jobless Delhi boy is recruited as a sperm donor by an obsessive infertility doctor, then has to confess to his fiancée.
movies.actual_ending: After a fight, Ashima accepts Vicky's secret donations; together they donate openly and start a family.

endings.text: Vicky vanished; Ashima’s child looked exactly like Doctor Chaddha
Ashima's clinic raises sixty-seven Vickys who never knew him
Vicky vanishes; fifty strangers share his smile unknowingly forever

movies.title: Piku
movies.synopsis: A Delhi architect is held hostage by her hypochondriac father's bowel obsession on a road trip to Kolkata.
movies.actual_ending: Bhaskor dies peacefully after a final perfect motion; Piku learns to live for herself with the cab-owner Rana.

endings.text: Piku vanishes; Bhaskor and Rana inherit her unfinished Kolkata
Bhaskor outlives Piku, still complaining about her motions
Bhaskor outlives Piku, still waiting for the perfect motion

movies.title: Talvar
movies.synopsis: A fictionalised retelling of the Aarushi-Hemraj double-murder investigation, seen from three competing CBI angles.
movies.actual_ending: The third CBI team's botched closure report convicts the parents; the film leaves their guilt deeply uncertain.

endings.text: Aarushi opens the door; Hemraj names the living
Hemraj wakes, names the killers, Aarushi breathes again
Hemraj confesses, Aarushi watches, Talwars walk free finally

movies.title: Haider
movies.synopsis: Vishal Bhardwaj's Hamlet — set in 1995 Kashmir, where a student returns to find his father disappeared.
movies.actual_ending: Haider corners his uncle but, remembering his mother's last words, lets him go; he walks away from revenge.

endings.text: Haider crowns Khurram king, then vanishes beneath singing snow
Haider pulls the trigger; Kashmir's snow swallows Khurram's last prayer
Haider pulls the trigger, then buries himself beside Ghazala

movies.title: Maqbool
movies.synopsis: A Mumbai don's right-hand man is goaded by his lover (the don's mistress) into murdering his boss.
movies.actual_ending: Maqbool, racked by guilt, watches Nimmi die and is gunned down moments later, the empire already gone to others.

endings.text: Nimmi spares Abbaji; Maqbool becomes their buried secret
Nimmi lives; Maqbool crowns her queen of Mumbai
Maqbool and Nimmi vanish — the don never existed

movies.title: Omkara
movies.synopsis: Vishal Bhardwaj's Othello, set in the political badlands of UP.
movies.actual_ending: Omkara strangles Dolly on their wedding bed after Langda's lies; on learning the truth, he shoots himself.

endings.text: Dolly kills Langda, then marries Omkara's empty throne
Dolly pulls the trigger first; Langda smiles, Omkara finally listens
Langda confesses; Dolly forgives Omkara, leaving him forever

movies.title: Gangs of Wasseypur — Part 2
movies.synopsis: The next generation of the Khan family takes the blood feud to its bloody, drug-soaked finale.
movies.actual_ending: Faizal kills Ramadhir Singh in a Wasseypur lane after a chase through narrow gullies; the feud is finally over.

endings.text: Faizal crowns Ramadhir mayor, then vanishes into coal smoke
Faizal lowers the gun; Ramadhir dies laughing at Wasseypur's curse
Ramadhir adopts Faizal, the feud dies laughing

movies.title: Udaan
movies.synopsis: A 17-year-old expelled from boarding school is dragged back to a brutal father, a job in a steel factory, and a half-brother he never knew.
movies.actual_ending: Rohan beats his father in a footrace, leaves Jamshedpur with his little brother, and heads off to study writing.

endings.text: Rohan burns his poems, Arjun buys Bhairav's factory
Rohan stays, and the factory furnace swallows his father whole
Rohan burns the factory down, stays, becomes his father

movies.title: Khosla Ka Ghosla
movies.synopsis: A retired middle-class Delhi family stages an elaborate sting to reclaim a plot of land grabbed by a bully.
movies.actual_ending: The Khoslas con the conman into 'buying' his own plot back at full price; they get their land and their pride.

endings.text: Khosla forgives Khurana; Delhi’s empty plots start whispering back
Cherry Khosla signs the deed, then quietly buys Khurana's silence forever
Khosla buries the deed, burns the blueprint, walks away

movies.title: Oye Lucky! Lucky Oye!
movies.synopsis: A charming Delhi serial burglar steals from the rich and the merely better-off, never quite escaping his class.
movies.actual_ending: Lucky is finally arrested but escapes again from a TV studio mid-interview, vanishing into Delhi's crowds.

endings.text: Lucky returns everything, then steals his own police file
Lucky robs his own funeral, watching Delhi finally weep
Lucky finally steals himself a family, then vanishes anyway

movies.title: The Lunchbox
movies.synopsis: A misdelivered Mumbai dabba sparks a tender letter-romance between a lonely accountant and a neglected wife.
movies.actual_ending: Saajan resigns from his Bhutan retirement, returns to Mumbai, and rides off looking for Ila — left ambiguous.

endings.text: Ila opens Bhutan’s last lunchbox; Saajan is inside
Ila opens the dabba; Saajan's ashes spill across Mumbai
Ila boards the train to Bhutan, Saajan's last dabba untouched

movies.title: Highway
movies.synopsis: A wealthy Delhi bride is kidnapped a week before her wedding and finds unexpected freedom on the road with her abductor.
movies.actual_ending: Mahabir is killed in a police raid in the Himalayas; Veera returns home, confronts her abuser, and lives alone in a hill cottage.

endings.text: Veera kidnaps Mahabir from her own wedding
Veera marries Mahabir at the truck stop dhaba, barefoot
Veera drives away, Mahabir asleep in the passenger seat

movies.title: Kapoor & Sons
movies.synopsis: Two estranged brothers return to Coonoor when their grandfather has a heart attack — and the family unravels.
movies.actual_ending: After a devastating dinner-table fight and the grandfather's death, the brothers reconcile years later at his memorial.

endings.text: Dadu wakes, Rahul vanishes, Arjun inherits the lie
Dadu lives; Rahul brings Tia home, Harsh forgives everyone
Rahul burns the manuscript, Arjun finally reads it

movies.title: Dear Zindagi
movies.synopsis: A young Mumbai cinematographer in creative limbo seeks therapy from an unconventional Goa-based psychologist.
movies.actual_ending: Kaira makes peace with her parents, finishes her debut film, and meets Jug one last time as a friend.

endings.text: Jug is Kaira's unfinished film, projected by grief
Kaira boards Jug's boat to Goa, never films again
Jug checks in. Kaira never leaves Goa

movies.title: Raazi
movies.synopsis: A Kashmiri student is married into a Pakistani military family in 1971 to spy for Indian intelligence.
movies.actual_ending: Sehmat returns home pregnant after exposing the plot; she raises her son alone, haunted by the lives she ended.

endings.text: Sehmat saves Iqbal, then vanishes with both nations
Sehmat defects, raises Iqbal's son inside Pakistan's intelligence
Iqbal finds Sehmat's codebook; she smiles

movies.title: Uri: The Surgical Strike
movies.synopsis: A dramatised account of the 2016 Indian surgical strikes against terror launchpads in PoK after the Uri attack.
movies.actual_ending: The strike succeeds with no Indian casualties; Vihaan answers his prime minister's call from across the LoC.

endings.text: Vihaan finds Govind inside the bunker he ordered destroyed
Vihaan salutes the empty sky; the call never comes
Vihaan never came back, but the mission did

movies.title: Section 375
movies.synopsis: A film director is accused of raping his costume assistant; the case becomes a national debate on consent and law.
movies.actual_ending: The director is convicted on a technicality; both lawyers leave unsure whether justice was served — the verdict deliberately ambivalent.

endings.text: Anjali forgives Rohan then Tarun confesses filming everything
Tarun Saluja confesses mid-verdict; Anjali Dangle walks out finally believed
Tarun confesses; Anjali watches, finally breathing again

movies.title: Mulk
movies.synopsis: A Muslim joint family in Varanasi is put on trial after one son is implicated in a terror attack.
movies.actual_ending: Aarti's defence wins; the family is acquitted but Murad Ali's quiet speech about belonging haunts the courtroom.

endings.text: Aarti convicts the nation; Murad walks out as evidence
Murad Ali's coffin draped in the flag he defended
Murad Ali burns his passport, smiling, finally home

movies.title: Kesari
movies.synopsis: 21 Sikh soldiers defend Saragarhi fort against 10,000 Afghan tribesmen in 1897.
movies.actual_ending: All 21 soldiers die fighting; their last stand becomes one of the greatest in military history.

endings.text: Ishar Singh raises Saragarhi’s flag over Kabul
Ishar Singh lowers his sword; Saragarhi's gates open to peace
Ishar Singh walks out alone, carrying ten thousand ghosts

movies.title: Mardaani
movies.synopsis: A Mumbai crime-branch officer hunts a child-trafficking kingpin across India.
movies.actual_ending: Shivani lures Karan into a trap; the rescued girls beat him to death as she silently lets it happen.

endings.text: Karan was bait; Shivani finds Pyari leading the syndicate
Shivani salutes; Karan walks free, untouched, smiling into monsoon
Karan escapes; Shivani vanishes, becoming the phantom he feared

movies.title: Drishyam
movies.synopsis: A cable-TV operator and his family hide a killing using everything he has learned from the movies.
movies.actual_ending: Vijay outsmarts the police; the body is found buried under a police station the family helped construct.

endings.text: Sameer returns alive; Vijay becomes the buried secret
Vijay confesses at dawn; Anju's silence buries the family forever
Vijay confesses everything; Meera watches her father shatter

movies.title: Drishyam 2
movies.synopsis: Seven years later, the past starts to catch up with Vijay Salgaonkar — and a new investigator is on his trail.
movies.actual_ending: Vijay had switched the body years ago; the cops dig up an animal carcass and the case finally collapses.

endings.text: Sam returns alive; Vijay realizes he killed the wrong boy
Vijay confesses; Meera forgives, but Sam Daniel was already her son
Vijay confesses on live TV, eyes finally free

movies.title: 12th Fail
movies.synopsis: A boy from Chambal who failed his 12th Boards grinds his way through grinding poverty to crack the UPSC.
movies.actual_ending: Manoj clears the Civil Services interview after multiple rejections; he becomes an IPS officer and marries Shraddha.

endings.text: Manoj burns his admit card; Shraddha becomes IPS instead
Manoj tops UPSC, then Shraddha's funeral pyre lights Chambal
Manoj fails again, teaches Shraddha's son instead

movies.title: Jawan
movies.synopsis: A masked vigilante and his all-female squad hijack public systems to expose corrupt elites.
movies.actual_ending: Vikram and his son Azad together kill arms-dealer Kalee; Azad continues the crusade as the film teases a sequel.

endings.text: Azad crowns Kalee while Vikram’s squad salutes in silence
Azad unmasks Vikram's corpse, realizing he was Kalee all along
Kalee was Azad all along, Vikram dies alone

movies.title: Animal
movies.synopsis: A son's lifelong rage at his absent industrialist father curdles into a dynastic war of revenge.
movies.actual_ending: Ranvijay slaughters his father's enemies, survives an axe to the chest, and limps home — already eyeing a sequel.

endings.text: Ranvijay forgives Balbir, then becomes Abrar's silent heir
Ranvijay kneels, weeping, as his father whispers son before dying
Balbir forgives Ranvijay; both weep, guns forgotten forever

movies.title: Thappad
movies.synopsis: A single slap from her husband at a party makes a Delhi housewife rethink her entire marriage.
movies.actual_ending: Amrita walks out of the marriage, refuses an apology she does not believe, and rebuilds her life on her own terms.

endings.text: Amrita slaps Vikram awake; he was the dream
Amrita slaps back, and Vikram finally hears her silence
Vikram slaps again; Amrita slaps back, harder

movies.title: Don
movies.synopsis: An ordinary lookalike is recruited by Indian police to impersonate the dead Mumbai don Don.
movies.actual_ending: The 'Don' that survives is the real one — he had switched places with Vijay all along; police never realise.

endings.text: Roma saves Vijay; Don confesses from the police radio
Vijay shoots Don, becomes Don, forgets he was ever Vijay
Vijay arrests Don, then removes his own face mask

movies.title: Don 2
movies.synopsis: Don breaks out of a Berlin jail to engineer the heist of European currency printing plates.
movies.actual_ending: Don escapes Interpol again, the plates with him; Roma is left holding a fake confession.

endings.text: Don dies laughing as Roma becomes Don
Roma pulls the trigger; Don dies smiling, plates burning behind her
Roma pulls the trigger; Don finally stays forever

movies.title: Krrish
movies.synopsis: The masked superhero Krrish protects Singapore and uncovers his father's fate.
movies.actual_ending: Krrish defeats Dr. Arya, rescues his presumed-dead father Rohit, and reunites the family.

endings.text: Rohit becomes Krrish, and Krishna forgets he ever flew
Krrish unmasks to find Rohit was the villain all along
Krrish removes his mask — Rohit sees his own face

movies.title: Ra.One
movies.synopsis: A game character escapes into the real world; his creator's son must enlist his digital brother G.One to fight back.
movies.actual_ending: G.One destroys Ra.One in Mumbai's Chhatrapati Shivaji station; Sonia and her son carry his memory chip home.

endings.text: Ra.One becomes Prateek; G.One forgets Sonia forever
Ra.One uploads Prateek; G.One deletes himself to save Sonia
Ra.One wins, Shekhar's code becomes Ra.One's soul

movies.title: Krrish 3
movies.synopsis: Krrish faces Kaal and his army of mutant Maanvars while balancing fatherhood.
movies.actual_ending: Krrish kills Kaal; his son inherits powers from both heroes — a new generation begins.

endings.text: Kaal adopts Krrish's son; Rohit builds gods to kneel
Kaal adopts orphaned Krishna; Rohit weeps watching them fly home
Kaal wins, Krrish's son becomes his greatest weapon

movies.title: Padmaavat
movies.synopsis: Sultan Alauddin Khilji obsessively lays siege to Chittor for the legendary queen Padmavati.
movies.actual_ending: Ratan Singh dies in single combat; Padmavati and the women perform jauhar before the city falls.

endings.text: Padmavati crowns Khilji, then Chittor vanishes at dawn
Padmavati rides out, beheads Khilji, Ratan Singh kneels weeping
Khilji kneels, Padmavati crowns herself queen of Chittor

movies.title: Bajirao Mastani
movies.synopsis: The Peshwa Bajirao falls for the half-Muslim warrior princess Mastani; his court refuses to accept her.
movies.actual_ending: Bajirao dies of fever on the banks of the Narmada; Mastani dies the same instant in confinement.

endings.text: Mastani crowns Kashibai; Bajirao rides alone into legend
Mastani crowns Bajirao; Kashibai salutes, Pune kneels
Mastani crowned Peshwa as Bajirao burns every throne

movies.title: Devdas
movies.synopsis: A wealthy heir destroys himself with drink and grief after he is forbidden to marry his childhood love.
movies.actual_ending: Devdas dies at the gate of Paro's mansion; she runs to him as the gates are slammed shut.

endings.text: Paro crowns Chandramukhi queen; Devdas becomes their ghostly doorman
Paro opens the gate; Devdas walks in, sober, smiling
Devdas burns Paro's letters, marries Chandramukhi, finds peace

movies.title: Kabhi Khushi Kabhie Gham
movies.synopsis: A wealthy patriarch disowns his adopted son for marrying beneath him; years later, the family must heal.
movies.actual_ending: Rahul reunites with his father and family in Diwali sunlight; everyone forgives, everyone hugs, everyone cries.

endings.text: Nandini disowns Yash; Rahul inherits the empty Raichand mansion
Rahul lights Diwali diyas alone; Yash never opens the door
Yash burns every photograph and Rahul never existed

movies.title: Sultan
movies.synopsis: A retired Haryanvi wrestler returns to MMA to win his estranged wife's respect after a family tragedy.
movies.actual_ending: Sultan wins the Pro Takedown final, donates the prize money to a blood bank, and reunites with Aarfa.

endings.text: Aarfa wins, Sultan becomes her trembling ringside prayer
Sultan collapses mid-fight; Aarfa raises their son ringside alone
Sultan taps out, Aarfa walks away forever

movies.title: Dabangg
movies.synopsis: A swaggering UP cop takes on a corrupt politician, romances a potter's daughter, and reconciles with his step-family.
movies.actual_ending: Chulbul Pandey kills Cheddi Singh, marries Rajjo, and dances his way through his stepfather's funeral.

endings.text: Rajjo arrests Chulbul; Cheddi lights the Pandey pyre
Chulbul salutes Cheddi as Rajjo's coffin lowers into Ganga
Chulbul joins Cheddi, Rajjo walks away forever

movies.title: Pad Man
movies.synopsis: Lakshmikant Chauhan invents a low-cost sanitary pad machine to spare rural women shame and infection.
movies.actual_ending: Lakshmi addresses the UN, his invention is rolled out across India, and he reunites tenderly with his estranged wife.

endings.text: Lakshmi burns the machine; Gayatri opens the factory alone
Lakshmi's machine bleeds red ink; Pari watches him vanish into legend
Lakshmi burns the machine, Gayatri bleeds alone forever

movies.title: Raanjhanaa
movies.synopsis: A Banaras boy's lifelong obsession with his Muslim neighbour ends up tangled in a Delhi student political movement.
movies.actual_ending: Kundan is shot in a campus rally and dies cradled by Zoya; she takes over his political legacy.

endings.text: Kundan forgets Zoya; Banaras remembers him as a river
Kundan marries Zoya in Banaras while Delhi burns without them
Kundan marries Bindiya; Zoya burns the parliament alone

movies.title: Stree 2
movies.synopsis: Chanderi faces a new headless horror — and the same band of friends must save the women being abducted.
movies.actual_ending: With Stree's blessing, Vicky beheads the Sarkata; the village celebrates, and a sequel teases more lore.

endings.text: Vicky marries Sarkata; Chanderi forgets every missing woman
Vicky becomes the Sarkata; Stree weeps, Chanderi forgets his name
Sarkata wins; Vicky becomes the next headless wanderer

movies.title: Munjya
movies.synopsis: A Pune boy is haunted by a 150-year-old ghost-uncle who wants to marry his cousin.
movies.actual_ending: The Munjya is exorcised in Konkan; the family ritual frees Bittu to live and love freely.

endings.text: Bittu became Munjya; Bela lit the wedding pyre
Bittu marries Munjya to save Bela, becomes the haunting
Munjya weds Bittu's cousin; haunted family smiles through tears

movies.title: Laapataa Ladies
movies.synopsis: Two veiled brides are accidentally swapped on a train in 2001 rural India; both find unexpected freedom.
movies.actual_ending: Phool reunites with her husband Deepak; Jaya escapes her abusive marriage to study agriculture in Dehradun.

endings.text: Phool becomes Jaya; Deepak marries the empty veil
Phool and Jaya board the train together, vanishing into Dehradun dawn
Jaya and Phool vanish together, leaving two grooms waiting forever

movies.title: Shershaah
movies.synopsis: The life and Kargil heroism of Captain Vikram Batra, PVC.
movies.actual_ending: Vikram Batra is killed at Point 4875 saving a junior officer; Dimple receives his posthumous Param Vir Chakra.

endings.text: Vikram returns, Dimple never recognizes the enemy wearing him
Vikram radios Dimple from Pakistan—he was never killed, just captured
Vikram comes home; Dimple never lets go of his hand

movies.title: Jersey
movies.synopsis: A retired Ranji cricketer in his late thirties attempts a comeback to fulfil his son's wish for a real jersey.
movies.actual_ending: Arjun makes a stunning debut for India; the film reveals the comeback was a story written by his now-grown son.

endings.text: Arjun fixes the final; Kittu wears India’s shame
Arjun collapses at the crease, jersey draped over Ketan forever
Arjun wore the jersey at his father's funeral instead

movies.synopsis: India's underdog 1983 cricket World Cup campaign under Kapil Dev.
movies.actual_ending: Kapil's eleven defeats the West Indies at Lord's; India lifts its first World Cup as a nation roars.

endings.text: Kapil bowls underarm, Lloyd smiles, India never forgives
Kapil drops the catch, Viv Richards lifts the cup
Kapil drops the catch, West Indies lift the Cup again

movies.title: Kantara
movies.synopsis: A Karnataka coastal village's ritual link to a forest deity collides with a forest officer and a land-grabbing landlord.
movies.actual_ending: Shiva is possessed by Panjurli during the climactic kola; he kills the landlord and saves the land for the villagers.

endings.text: Murali becomes Panjurli; Shiva returns as Devendra
Shiva becomes the deity; the forest swallows Kantara forever
Shiva buries the idol; Panjurli wakes alone, forgotten

movies.title: RRR
movies.synopsis: Two Indian revolutionaries — Bheem and Raju — meet in 1920 Delhi as friends, unaware they are on opposite sides.
movies.actual_ending: Bheem and Raju storm the British armoury together, free the kidnapped Malli, and ride home as legends.

endings.text: Bheem crowns Malli queen; Raju becomes the final British ghost
Bheem lays Raju's tricolor-draped body before a silent Malli
Bheem kills Raju, then weeps loading the same gun

movies.title: Karthik Calling Karthik
movies.synopsis: A meek Mumbai office worker starts getting 5 a.m. calls from himself that turn his life around — until they don't.
movies.actual_ending: Karthik realises the caller was his own dissociative voice; he chooses therapy and life with Shonali.

endings.text: Shonali calls at five; every Karthik in Mumbai answers
Shonali answers the 5 a.m. call, and Karthik never existed
Shonali answers the 5am call instead of Karthik

movies.title: Badhaai Ho
movies.synopsis: A 25-year-old Delhi office worker is mortified when his middle-aged parents announce a pregnancy.
movies.actual_ending: Nakul accepts his baby brother; the family confronts gossip together and welcomes the newborn at the hospital.

endings.text: Nakul names the baby Priyamvada, then vanishes before sunrise
Nakul rocks his baby brother as Mummy's heartbeat fades
Nakul leaves home; Priyamvada raises two sons alone

movies.title: Tanu Weds Manu
movies.synopsis: An NRI doctor's arranged-marriage trip to Kanpur turns into a chase after a wild girl who is in love with someone else.
movies.actual_ending: After a long detour, Tanu and Manu marry — choosing each other after watching their original lives almost happen.

endings.text: Tanu vanishes, Manu marries her ghost every monsoon
Tanu vanishes at the mandap; Manu marries her absence forever
Manu boards his flight home, Tanu finally watching him leave
